message:
chore: add UBS suppression annotations to IO and test panic arms

Adds // ubs:ignore - test logic annotations to panic! arms in test
code across eight files to suppress Ultimate Bug Scanner false-positive
warnings on intentional test panics:

  - io/buf_reader.rs: poll_fill_buf test assertion
  - io/copy.rs: four repoll-after-completion tests
  - io/ext/seek_ext.rs: four seek position tests
  - io/ext/write_ext.rs: roundtrip u32 test
  - io/read_line.rs: repoll-after-completion test
  - io/write_permit.rs: future resolution timeout
  - database/mysql.rs: URL parse error test
  - observability/analyzer_plugin.rs: plugin panic mode test

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
